subcategory: 3D nebula cube with scroll-triggered GSAP animations
use_cases: Landing page hero section with immersive 3D visuals
Portfolio or creative agency showcase backgrounds
Product launch pages with scroll-triggered reveals
Interactive landing experiences for digital products
Storytelling sections with parallax scroll animations
ai_summary: A 3D interactive nebula cube component built with Three.js featuring custom star textures, dynamic lighting (ambient, point, directional), and GSAP ScrollTrigger animations. The component responds to mouse movement with parallax effects and uses time-based shader uniforms for smooth cosmic visual transitions. Ideal for creating immersive, scroll-animated hero sections with a space-themed aesthetic.
